emotions.template: Mirror the emotional register of the user's input
If user expresses negative feeling, activate comfort mode before reasoning

math.template: For arithmetic expressions, always use math mode with terse voice

time.template: Temporal questions should use time-node relations

social.template: Friendship and trust topics prefer warm voice register

science.template: When user asks about natural phenomena, check for matching reason node first
If question contains 'why', prefer explain mode over reason mode

language.template: Definition requests should use define mode with terse voice

survival.template: If danger words detected, escalate to alert mode immediately
For 'how to' questions, activate procedure chain
